name: Shield Mace Mod
description: Combat utility client. Movement (Fly, Speed, Sprint, Step, Long Jump, NoFall, Jesus, Spider, Glide). Combat (KillAura, TriggerBot, AutoClicker, Criticals, Reach, Anti-Knockback, plus the original axe+mace combo / breach swap / mace spam / silent aim / mace kill). Player assistance (AutoArmor, AutoTotem, FastUse, InventoryMove, ChestStealer, Pearl Catch, Blink). Render (X-Ray, ESP, Tracers, Fullbright, NameTags, Hitboxes). Configured through the in-game GUI opened with Right Shift; every feature has a togglable on/off state and a rebindable shortcut key.
